name: subject-not-descriptor-throws
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :RunExamplesSubjectNotDescriptor :message "runExamples requires descriptor Map subject, got Number" :operand "runExamples" :position "subject" :expectedType "descriptor Map" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "runExamples" :args null :effectful false :text "runExamples" :location { :start { :offset 5 :line 1 :column 6 } :end { :offset 16 :line 1 :column 17 } } } :input 42 } :trail [] }

name: subject-without-examples-field-throws
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :RunExamplesNoExamplesField :message "runExamples requires the subject descriptor to carry an :examples Vec, got descriptor of kind builtin" :subjectKind "builtin" :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "runExamples" :args null :effectful false :text "runExamples" :location { :start { :offset 19 :line 1 :column 20 } :end { :offset 30 :line 1 :column 31 } } } :input {:kind :builtin} } :trail [] }
